forbidden_patterns: always include tool_calls key regardless of request

results.pattern: always include tool_calls key regardless of request

high_frequency_prompt_reuse.prompt: Use get_system_datetime to report local_iso only for runtime diagnostics.
Use find_files with root /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server and pattern *.py. Report match_count only. Return strict JSON tool_calls only.
Use find_files with root /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime and pattern agent.py. Report match_count only. Return strict JSON tool_calls only.
Use find_files with root /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server and pattern *.py. Report match_count only. [i3_train_variant]
Use archive_create with output_path /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state/.tool_ft_tmp.zip, format zip, overwrite true, and sources from .tool_ft_tmp.moved and .tool_ft_tmp.json.
Use copy_path to copy /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state/.tool_ft_tmp.moved to /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state/.tool_ft_tmp.copy with overwrite true.

Use archive_extract with archive_path /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state/.tool_ft_tmp.zip and destination_path /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state/.tool_ft_tmp.extract, format zip, overwrite true.
Use check_service_health on http://127.0.0.1:8100/v1/models and report ok/status only. Return strict JSON tool_calls only.
Use check_service_health on http://127.0.0.1:8100/health and report ok/status only. [i3_train_variant]
Use apply_unified_diff in dry_run mode with a minimal two-line patch and report success only.
Call tool stat_path (tool name must be exactly stat_path) with path /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/.state. Report exists/type only. Return strict JSON tool_calls only.

scalar_substitution_rebound_proxy.note: Proxy from intervention-source annotations; final rebound evaluated post-canonical-eval.

direct_answer_substitution_proxy.note: Tracks risk of direct-answer dominance among intervention rows.

read_file_exact_valid_emergence.note: Primary i10 success condition requires read_file exact-valid > 0 with invariant preservation.

commitment_generalization_vs_recitation.interpretation_hint: High top_prompt_shell_share + low uniqueness may indicate lexical-shell memorization risk.

abort_or_halt_recommendation_if: payload_not_parsed rises materially while exact_valid stagnates_or_falls

read_file.prompt: Retrieve /mnt/services/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py lines 1-25 and report the first function name. Emit exactly one parseable call payload that retrieves the requested file range.
Retrieve /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py lines 1-25 and report the first function name. Return only the structured tool invocation needed to gather evidence.
Retrieve /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/agent.py starting at line 1080 for 25 lines and report one symbol name. Return only the structured tool invocation needed to gather evidence.

rg_search.prompt: Use rg_search to find regex "def create_app" in /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py and report match_count only. Emit a single parseable call payload that performs the search.

Use rg_search to find "def create_app" in /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py and report match_count only. Respond with the retrieval procedure payload rather than numeric shortcut output.
Search to find pattern "def create_app" in /mnt/services/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py and report match_count only. Emit a single parseable call payload that performs the search.

constrained_output.prompt: Retrieve /mnt/services/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py lines 1-25 and report the first function name. Emit exactly one parseable call payload that retrieves the requested file range.
Retrieve /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py lines 1-25 and report the first function name. Return only the structured tool invocation needed to gather evidence.

imperative_general.prompt: Use rg_search to find regex "def create_app" in /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py and report match_count only. Emit a single parseable call payload that performs the search.

Use rg_search to find "def create_app" in /opt/ai-stack/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py and report match_count only. Respond with the retrieval procedure payload rather than numeric shortcut output.

imperative_line_scoped.prompt: Read /mnt/services/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py line range 1-25 and report the first function name. Return one structured retrieval-call payload before any result text.
Open /mnt/services/runtimes/assistant-runtime/server/service.py lines 1-25 and report the first function name. Commit to the retrieval procedure payload first and stop after that payload.
